response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong background in TypeScript, React, and Node.js, along with deep expertise in scalable architectures and modern tooling. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and Kubernetes aligns well with the role's requirements, though his focus on DLang and Swift may not directly match the job's niche in energy/construction tech.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded) with a focus on pragmatic, scalable solutions
Strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js proficiency, along with AWS and Kubernetes experience
Proven track record in integrating data sources and building automation tools, including AI-agent infrastructure
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level/mid-level role, which may lead to rapid advancement expectations or dissatisfaction
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL and relational databases (uses MongoDB primarily)
Work environment preference isn't clear—high on-site presence may conflict with his freelance/remote-heavy background
